role.title: Software Architect
role.description: The architect is responsible for the system’s structure and technical direction. They approve architectural changes, guide technology choices and ensure that the repository adheres to the Architecture Integrity Pack.

list.item: Review proposals for new frameworks, languages or infrastructure changes. Require ADRs for significant decisions.
Maintain architectural diagrams and ADRs, updating them when changes are approved.
Enforce layering and domain boundaries. Use dependency analysis tools to detect cycles and leaks.
Coordinate with the performance engineer to ensure architectural choices meet performance requirements.
Guide component decomposition and advocate for modular design.
